headline: Invitation Homes Announces Dates for First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
summary: DALLAS, April 08, 2026--Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE: INVH) ("Invitation Homes," the "Company," or "our"), the nation's premier single-family home leasing and management company, will release its first quarter 2026 financial and operating results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after the market closes. The Company will host a conference call that will be webcast live on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review first quarter results, discuss recent events, and conduct a questio
